The '''Imperial Board of Culture''', or '''IBC''' for short, was the governmental body within the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that was charged with reviewing and censoring popular culture media, such as music and [[Holodrama/Legends|holofilms]], that was to be distributed within the Empire. The Board had three levels of tolerance, which were assigned to various works as they were released:

*Pro-Imperial works were allowed for and promoted to the public.<ref name="Empire Divided" />
*Scarlet works did not promote the Empire, but did not degrade it either.<ref name="Empire Divided" />
*Banned works were decidedly anti-Imperial in nature.<ref name="Empire Divided" />

Often, a work that earned a Scarlet rating, or was outright banned by the Board, would be guaranteed a high degree of popularity. Possession of a Scarlet work was deemed a misdemeanor offense at Imperial discretion. Possession of a banned work was a major offense and was punishable by a fine of 500 to 1,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], as well as confiscation of the offending material.<ref name="Empire Divided" />
